distinctive_elements: fusion of traditional Japanese ninja/samurai aesthetics with futuristic setting

extraction_notes: Limited audio documentation available. Wikipedia source provides only composer name (Takahito Abe) and one critical description of music style from GamePro review as 'techno Japanese rock at its most mundane'. No tempo, key, chord progression, specific SFX characteristics per area, or track-level details are documented in available sources. Reviewers criticized the sound quality but did not provide technical audio parameters.
